---
title: "TextLabel.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TextLabel.tsx"
loc: 32
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.30
style_score: 4.13
intel_score: 3.25
overall_score: 5.14
---

## Intent
The `TextLabel.tsx` module implements the floating text labels for the 3D neural graph. It renders the filename above each active node using `@react-three/drei`'s `Text`, ensuring that the repository's structure is easily navigable and identifiable in the 3D environment.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is rendered as a child of a node group. It automatically tracks the node's position in the 3D scene and billboarding its orientation to face the camera for maximum readability.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Text](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TextLabel`
- `TextLabel`
- `textRef`
- `filename`
